creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Addendum:

php80-ldap-8.0.15  has been installed and also rebuilt twice to ensure it is not the culprit by false installation. 

Also did I CLI tests via "su -m www -c 'php occ ldap:xxxx'", the command line service facility of www/nextcloud. Everything seemed all right so far, listing checking of users went flawless.
